supporting_reasons: FIELD_03 confirms no central grid expansion; decentralized path is heavily prioritized.
Building morphology indicates strong suitability (low-rise residential cluster).
Postal-code level PV adoption metrics show active interest.
blockers_and_caveats: FIELD_04 relies on postal-code proxy (PLZ 41470) due to missing segment-exact polygon.
overall_opportunity limited to MEDIUM and confidence capped at MEDIUM until Point-in-Polygon validation is achieved.
